name: GIGABYTE A620M GAMING X AX Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 1x M.2 Slot - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2
